name: Props echo
description: Slice O props_update round-trip fixture. The blueprint renders a server-driven `count` prop and exposes a `bump` button that fires the `bump_count` wired action; the mount tool increments per-session state and pushes the new prop via `ctx.sendPropsUpdate`. The renderer's `props_update` branch applies the patch in-place and the DOM stamps the new value on `data-ggui-prop-count`. Used by `mcp-app-iframe.spec.ts::props-update-roundtrip` to prove the hostâ†’iframe props channel is live-wired.

contract.intent: Echo a server-driven `count` prop into the DOM and let the user bump it via a wired action that flows through the props_update emission seam.

props.description: Server-pushed state â€” the count is initialized to 0 by default and replaced via `props_update` after every wired-action dispatch.

count.description: Current counter value. Server replaces this via `props_update` after each `bump_count` dispatch.

bump.label: Bump count
bump.description: Increment the per-session counter by 1. The mount tool fires `ctx.sendPropsUpdate` so the new value lands as a `props_update` frame on the live channel.
